CREATE TABLE geo_points (lat FLOAT64, lon FLOAT64);
SELECT h3PointDistRads(lat, lon, 10.0, 0.0) AS distance FROM geo_points;

WITH (SELECT lat, lon FROM geo_points WHERE lat >= -90 AND lat <= 90) AS point1, (SELECT lat, lon FROM geo_points WHERE lon >= -180 AND lon <= 180) AS point2 SELECT h3PointDistRads(point1.lat, point1.lon, point2.lat, point2.lon) AS distance FROM point1, point2;
CREATE TABLE geo_pairs AS SELECT g1.lat AS lat1, g1.lon AS lon1, g2.lat AS lat2, g2.lon AS lon2 FROM geo_points g1 CROSS JOIN geo_points g2;
SELECT h3PointDistRads(lat1, lon1, lat2, lon2) AS distance FROM geo_pairs;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM geo_pairs WHERE h3PointDistRads(lat1, lon1, lat2, lon2) >= 1.0;
CREATE TABLE geo_distances AS SELECT lat1, lon1, lat2, lon2, h3PointDistRads(lat1, lon1, lat2, lon2) AS distance FROM geo_pairs;
SELECT AVG(distance) FROM geo_distances WHERE distance IS NOT NULL;
SELECT h3PointDistRads(E.lat, E.lon, F.lat, F.lon) AS distance FROM (SELECT lat, lon FROM geo_points) AS E JOIN (SELECT lat, lon FROM geo_points WHERE lat > 0) AS F ON E.lat <> F.lat;
